storageDevtoolsPanel.emptyDescription: Register an instance in {{code}} to see it here.
storageDevtoolsPanel.heading: Storage instances
storageDevtoolsPanel.description: Configured via {{code}}. Keys are read once per open — {{iStorage}} has no subscribe API, so a re-open refreshes the sample.
storageDevtoolsPanel.noKeysLabel: No keys stored in this instance yet.
storageDevtoolsPanel.managerUnavailableLabel: Storage manager not resolved — sample keys unavailable.
